overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a narrow purple-lit foggy alley into wider orange-hazed streets with neon signs, passing holographic displays and crowds of pedestrians before reaching a plaza with blue buildings and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow foggy alley with purple neon lighting

events.description: purple neon fog begins transitioning to warmer orange ambient light ahead
exiting narrow alley into wider street with visible crosswalk and palm trees

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through dense purple fog in a narrow alley, approaching a brighter opening

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure standing in the fog ahead, facing the camera

entered.detail: intense magenta and purple neon strips illuminating the fog on the left wall
dark concrete building facade with vertical architectural details
thick volumetric fog reducing visibility to silhouettes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley suffused with dense purple fog and magenta neon lighting. The camera walks forward through the haze toward silhouetted figures, with the lighting gradually shifting from purple to orange as the alley exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with 24/7 convenience stores and palm trees

events.description: crossing the street over yellow striped crosswalk with green walk signal visible
ambient lighting shifts from purple to warm orange haze as fog density changes

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk past a 24/7 store

entered.detail: illuminated blue and yellow convenience store sign reading '24/7 STORE'
tall palm tree visible through the orange haze ahead
yellow and white painted zebra crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a wider street bathed in orange-hued fog. The camera crosses a striped crosswalk and passes a glowing 24/7 store sign, with palm trees visible through the haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk with holographic tourist displays and crowds

events.description: passing a large glowing yellow holographic tourist information display
slight turn to avoid pedestrians while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: walking along the crowded sidewalk, navigating between pedestrians and observing the holographic displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair and cybernetic implants walking ahead

entered.detail: large glowing yellow wireframe cube displaying 'TOURIST INFORMATION' with rotating imagery
massive curved glass and steel building rising into the orange fog
planters with palm trees lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a bustling sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing a bright yellow holographic tourist display. The crowd density increases with pedestrians walking in the same direction, while massive skyscrapers loom through the orange haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway under overhead transit gantry

events.description: entering narrower passage alongside tall building wall with overpass structure ahead
briefly obscured by pedestrians passing close to the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow sidewalk next to a sheer building wall, approaching an overpass structure

notable_agents.action: security guard in vest standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: large metal overhead transit structure spanning the street ahead
sheer beige concrete facade with green window strips running vertically
orange and black striped caution barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The path narrows to a walkway alongside a tall concrete building with green-trimmed windows. The camera approaches a massive overpass gantry while construction barriers line the right side, and sparse vehicle traffic moves on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza intersection with blue and red commercial buildings

events.description: crossing intersection as vehicles including a police car navigate the crossing
ambient lighting becomes clearer and bluer as fog density decreases

agents.ego_description: navigating across a busy intersection, avoiding vehicles and crossing with groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: police car with headlights on driving through the intersection

entered.detail: distinctive bright blue building facade with red window frames and industrial piping
black and white police car with emergency lights driving through the plaza
large illuminated advertising screen displaying product imagery

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide plaza intersection with distinctive blue and red commercial buildings. The camera crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while a police car drives through, and the atmospheric fog clears to reveal clearer blue-tinted lighting and more distant architectural details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, purple-lit alleyway into a sprawling, blue-tinted urban plaza. It begins by pushing through dense magenta fog and silhouetted figures, with the lighting gradually shifting to orange as the camera emerges from the narrow passage. As the scene opens into a wider street, the camera crosses a striped crosswalk past a glowing 24/7 store and moves along a palm-lined sidewalk featuring a bright yellow holographic display and growing crowds of pedestrians. The path then narrows alongside a concrete building with green-trimmed windows and construction barriers before passing under a massive overpass gantry. Finally, the camera enters a wide intersection of blue and red commercial buildings where the atmospheric haze clears to reveal a police car and distant architectural details under a crisp, blue-tinted light.
